introSection: Big LEGO Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster from Swiss company Bolliger & Mabillard currently under construction at Legoland Shenzhen in Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.
fullText: Big LEGO Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster from Swiss company Bolliger & Mabillard currently under construction at Legoland Shenzhen in Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.
